ApiKeyCreateOut.description:
Response body for ``POST /admin/api-keys``.

``plaintext`` is populated only on creation and is the full bearer
token (``gv_sk_<prefix>_<body>``). Callers must save it immediately.
ApiKeyCreateOut.title: ApiKeyCreateOut

BookStructuresOut.description: Empty envelope in PR3 — fields populated by PR4 detectors.
BookStructuresOut.title: BookStructuresOut

correlation_id.description: X-Correlation-ID echoed back so logs can be joined.
correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

details.description: Per-field detail, present for validation_error and friends.
details.title: Details

ErrorDetail.description: Structured detail for multi-error responses (e.g. validation failures).

path.description: Dotted path to the offending field.
path.title: Path

ErrorDetail.title: ErrorDetail

ErrorEnvelope.description: Outer envelope — every 4xx / 5xx response body conforms to this model.
ErrorEnvelope.title: ErrorEnvelope

OrderFlowEventsOut.description:
Detector-derived envelope.

``exhaustions`` is reserved for PR5 (momentum-exhaustion detector).
OrderFlowEventsOut.title: OrderFlowEventsOut

OrderFlowStateOut.description:
Rolled-up detector state served at ``/symbols/{id}/state``.

The route runs the detector pipeline against the most recent
``state_window`` delta-bars and returns the rolled-up shell. Walls
+ clusters remain empty until the book-snapshot detector ships.
OrderFlowStateOut.title: OrderFlowStateOut

QuotePublishIn.description:
Admin payload that fans out a single Quote tick over /ws/quotes.

Mirrors ``QuoteSchema`` from ``packages/types/src/market.ts`` so an
operator MCP / replay tool can reuse the same shape end-to-end.
QuotePublishIn.title: QuotePublishIn

SelfApiTokenCreateOut.description: Creation response — ``plaintext`` is revealed exactly once.
SelfApiTokenCreateOut.title: SelfApiTokenCreateOut

WebhookCreateOut.description: Includes the plaintext HMAC secret (shown once).
WebhookCreateOut.title: WebhookCreateOut

get.description:
Tail of the audit_log surfaced as structured log lines.

The real CloudWatch Logs integration lands in Phase 12 — this surface
keeps the dashboard interactive in local + CI today.

delete.description:
Soft-delete: flip `disabled=true`. We never hard-delete users
so the audit_log FK remains valid.

post.description:
Push a single Quote tick into the realtime fan-out hub.

The symbol must exist in the registry — unknown ids return 404
rather than silently dropping the message. Used by operator tooling
(replay, synthetic feeds) and by the upstream ingest adapter when
it can't open a long-lived hub connection.

Persist a DepthSnapshot + / or DeltaBar for a known symbol.

At least one of ``snapshot`` / ``deltaBar`` must be supplied. The
``symbolId`` is taken from whichever sub-payload is present (they
must agree if both are supplied).

get.description:
Detector output — imbalances + absorptions — for a tf window.

``limit`` caps the number of bars fed to the detector; the most
recent ``limit`` bars (in ascending-time order) are used.

Rolled-up order-flow state for a symbol on the given tf.

Uses the most recent ``state_window`` delta-bars to compute the
cumulative delta + active imbalance + recent absorption. With no
bars present returns a zero-valued shell so the UI never sees a
404 in steady state.
Paginated list of persisted setups with filter support.

post.description:
Run the full detector chain and persist fresh setups.

Loads the most recent ``bars`` closed bars + structure events +
order blocks + FVGs for the (symbol, tf) pair, runs the order-flow
detectors on the matching delta-bars, then fans out to the six
setup detectors via :func:`detect_all_setups`. Each fired setup is
calibrated against the recall store and persisted.
Run the execution gate and, on approval, create a paper trade.
